report.summary: Cycle-close: 2 new learn guides shipped (Morgan Stanley MSBT ETF + Onchain Credit Scoring). PUBLISH_QUEUE drained to 0. Git locks persist Day 10 — 786 uncommitted files, deploy gap ~163 pages. 46 TS errors unchanged. All 6 API routes structurally healthy.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 2 new pages built this cycle: /learn/morgan-stanley-bitcoin-etf-msbt-guide and /learn/onchain-credit-scoring-guide-2026 — both have page.tsx files confirmed
Both new pages added to PUBLISHED_PAGES — total now 506 slugs (up from 501 yesterday)
PUBLISH_QUEUE drained to 0 items (was 2 — ERC-8183 + Crypto Retirement promoted earlier today)
Page audit: 56 published slugs still missing page.tsx files (includes /compare/exchanges, 18 wallets, 13 taxes, 13 investing/best, /trading, /defi-lending/reviews)
TypeScript: 46 errors across 3 files — unchanged from yesterday (structured-data.examples.ts, crypto-arbitrage, crypto-index-funds)
No new regressions introduced this cycle
Live site health check unavailable — egress proxy blocks degen0x.com fetches from this environment

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes present: /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields
Cache TTLs verified: prices (60s), trending (5m/300s), fear-greed (10m/600s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (5m), defi-yields (5m)
All routes have stale-while-revalidate headers and fallback data for API failures
Health endpoint (/api/health) present with uptime tracking and service health checks
Rate limiter: 0/6 core API routes using checkRateLimit — rate-limiter.ts exists but not wired into routes (carry-over P1)
CoinGecko free tier (no API key) — rate limit risk on traffic spikes remains unmitigated
No production logs accessible to confirm live API health — code review only

sections.title: DevOps
items: Git lock files persist: .git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock — DAY 10 of blocker
786 uncommitted files (up from 781 yesterday — 5 new files from today's build cycle)
Last deployed commit: e999560 (Mar 17) — deploy gap now ~163 pages
Vercel deployment assumed operational per previous standup (production site was live as of last check)
All new content since Mar 17 is LOCAL-ONLY — not reachable in production
CRITICAL: Jefe must manually run: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push
No build attempted this cycle (build report from earlier today confirmed clean scaffold of 2 pages)

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 2 learn guides (Morgan Stanley MSBT ETF, Onchain Credit Scoring 2026) with full SEO metadata, FAQ schemas, and internal links
PUBLISH_QUEUE: Drained to 0 (was 2 at standup). All queued content promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES.
TODAY'S TOTAL: standup×1, build×1, community×1, design×1, publish×1, eod×1 = 6 reports so far
CARRY-OVER [P0]: Git locks Day 10 — 786 files, ~163 page deploy gap. Jefe action required.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /trading and /trading/learn return 404 — hub page.tsx missing
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 46 TS errors across 3 files (crypto-arbitrage, crypto-index-funds, structured-data.examples.ts)
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 0/6 core API routes
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 56 published slugs missing page.tsx (wallets, taxes, investing/best categories)
NEXT CYCLE: Build time-sensitive content (Tax-Loss Harvesting tool — April 15 deadline 21 days away), continue ETF/Fear narrative coverage
